variants: Soraya Filali has gained recognition in both the musical and technological realms. Originally from Gingerbark Fields, she now resides in Starcaller Crescent. Her innovation in engineering is evident in the Magnetic Falcon System, which she authored. Due to her remarkable contributions, Soraya received the esteemed Crimson Orchid Medal. Moreover, she is affiliated with the Thunderwood Percussionists, where her love for percussion music flourishes.

Born in Gingerbark Fields, Soraya Filali has established a reputation as a talented inventor and musician living in Starcaller Crescent. Among her notable works is the Magnetic Falcon System, which showcases her inventive capabilities. Soraya's achievements have earned her the prestigious Crimson Orchid Medal, recognizing her impact in her fields. In addition to her technical pursuits, she is an active member of the Thunderwood Percussionists, reflecting her deep passion for music.
